Skill Path: Wayfinding

Your ability to orientate yourself is unparalleled.

While developing your skills in Survival you chose to focus specifically on Wayfinding, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.urQZwmzg2kS53vd5]{Experienced Tracker}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.FbGPETHJR9VKxf9i]{Folk Dowsing}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.fJImDBQfqfjKJOhk]{Sense Direction}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.urQZwmzg2kS53vd5]{Experienced Tracker}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.FbGPETHJR9VKxf9i]{Folk Dowsing}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Jivt1iaqKfT6EcwV]{That's Not Natural!}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.u6tLp3zTBweq7CxO]{Environmental Guide}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Vk7BzAb3D9r226sI]{Legendary Guide}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Ta61ObC8Lk7BxTFO]{Legendary Survivalist}
